2026-0261
2026-03-25JUSOther Than Statutory AuthorityAppointment of a puisne Judge of the Court of Appeal of QuebecAppointment of Honourable Andres C. Garin, a Judge of the Superior Court of Quebec for the district of Montréal, to be a puisne Judge of the Court of Appeal of Quebec, with residence in the territory of Ville de Montréal or in the immediate vicinity thereof.N/A
subject: Appointment of a puisne Judge of the Court of Appeal of Quebec
precis: Appointment of Honourable Andres C. Garin, a Judge of the Superior Court of Quebec for the district of Montréal, to be a puisne Judge of the Court of Appeal of Quebec, with residence in the territory of Ville de Montréal or in the immediate vicinity thereof.
